name: Lemon Bread with Lemon Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C).
2. Grease and flour a 9x5 inch loaf pan for each loaf of bread you are making.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar, milk, butter, and eggs; mix well.
4. Blend in flour, baking powder, salt, and grated lemon rind.
5. Pour mixture into prepared pans and bake for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
6. Cool slightly, remove from pan, and set on foil.
7. Meanwhile, prepare glaze: In a saucepan, combine sugar and lemon juice. Stir over low heat until sugar dissolves and glaze is hot.
8. Pour hot glaze slowly over surface of bread. Let cool completely before slicing.
9. To prepare Lemon Ice: Combine water and sugar in a saucepan. Add rind and bring to a boil. Simmer 5 minutes. Let cool.
10. Add lemon juice and stir. Pour liquid into freezer trays (two for each loaf of bread) and freeze until set, but not hard.
11. Place frozen cubes in food processor or blender. If desired, add egg whites (they will make the ice smooth and white), and beat until smooth.
12. Refreeze for about 3 hours or until firm.
13. When ready to serve, let stand for a few minutes before scooping out.
14. Serve bread slices with a scoop of lemon ice on the side.
